title: Marqeta Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results
text: Marqeta Q3 2025 Earnings Results. Key Financial Metrics. Revenue & Profitability: Net Revenue: $163 million (up 28% YoY). Gross Profit: $115 million (up 27% YoY). Net Loss: $4 million (improved from $29 million loss in Q3 2024). Gross Margin: 70%. Operating Performance: Total Processing Volume (TPV): $98 billion (up 33% YoY). Adjusted EBITDA: $30 million (up 236% YoY). Adjusted EBITDA Margin: 19% (up 12 percentage points). Per Share Metrics: Net Loss per Share (Diluted): $(0.01). Management Commentary: CEO Mike Milotich stated: Our robust Q3 financial results demonstrate our business momentum and our ability to deliver strong growth while rapidly improving our profitability. Business Highlights: The company secured contracts with major clients including a Fortune 500 company for supplier payments and deepened relationships with existing expense management customers, expanding into Europe through their recent TransactPay acquisition. Q4 2025 Guidance: Net Revenue Growth: 22-24%. Gross Profit Growth: 17-19%. Adjusted EBITDA Margin: 15-16%.
